Flow.description: Simplified single-screen Edit Customer flow with Gender field (V2)
Flow.label: Edit Customer V2

formulas.name: frm_NameChanged
formulas.expression: OR( AND({!var_IsPersonAccount} = TRUE, OR( BLANKVALUE({!var_OrigAccount.FirstName},"") <> BLANKVALUE({!var_EditAccount.FirstName},""), BLANKVALUE({!var_OrigAccount.MiddleName},"") <> BLANKVALUE({!var_EditAccount.MiddleName},""), BLANKVALUE({!var_OrigAccount.LastName},"") <> BLANKVALUE({!var_EditAccount.LastName},"") )), AND({!var_IsPersonAccount} = FALSE, BLANKVALUE({!var_OrigAccount.Name},"") <> BLANKVALUE({!var_EditAccount.Name},"")) )

fields.name: Source_System_ID_Display
fields.fieldText:
Source System ID: {!var_OrigAccount.SourceSystemId__c}

Reference only — not editable.

fields.name: Privacy_Warning
fields.fieldText: Important: Customers can only update their own information.

fields.name: Screen_Success_Message
fields.fieldText:
Customer details submitted successfully.

Changes will reflect on the Account shortly.

fields.name: Screen_No_Changes_Message
fields.fieldText: No changes detected. Please go back and edit, or close this flow.
